---
title: "Project Proposal STAT 405"
<<<<<<< HEAD
author: "Kelly-Ann Lessard, Qinxin Liu, and Griffin McDonald"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## GitHub Repository
The link for the public repository containing our project is <https://github.com/qinxinLiu/STAT-405-Project.git>.


## Datasets

Our preferred dataset is ####. **Description ####** It's URL is <####>. 

```{r data1, echo=FALSE}
#head(data_df) ####
```

Our backup dataset is ####. **Description ####** It's URL is <####>. 

```{r data2, echo=FALSE}
#head(data_df) ####
```


## Scientific Question
**Explanation ####**


## Methodology
**Plan ####**


## Contribution Plan
